titleStmt.title: SII 38.452: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 452. (A.R. No. 452 of 1912.) KŌṬṬŪR, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the south wall, maṇḍapa, infront of the central shrine, Koḻundīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvanachchakravarttin Rājādhi[rājadēva] (II), who captured Madurai and Īḻam. Year: 13, Makara, Rēvati 1175 A.D.

summary.p: Damaged in several places. It records that the Śivabrāhmaṇas of thirty circle, Kāśyapaṉ Muḍigoṇḍāṉ Duṟgaiyāṉ, Taruṇēndra Simha Bhaṭṭaṉ, Tavaśrīmuḍiyān Aviṉāsi Bhaṭṭaṉ and others of the Koḻundāṇḍār temple at Kōṭṭūr in Rājēndrachōḻa-vaḷanāḍu, received one hundred and twenty kāśu from Kuḍimai Ulagaṉ alias Rājēndrasiṅgappallavaraiyar of Pāṇḍikulāśaṉi-vaḷanāḍu for burning a perpetual lamp to the god. The priests gave an undertaking (ubhyat-tīṭṭu) to burn the lamp with one uḻakku of oil daily out of the interest of the gifted amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ madhuraiyum Īḻamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiṉa
śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 3 Āvatu makara ṉāyiṟṟu
maiyum peṟṟa �revatiṉāḷ rājendracoḻa vaḷaṉāṭṭu
koṭṭur Uṭaiyār koḻuṉtāṇṭārkoyil kāṇiyu
hmaṇar kāśyapaṉ muṭikoṇṭāṉ tuṟkaiyāṉ civa
ṉ Uḷḷiṭṭomum taruṇendracekaraṉ siṁhapaṭṭaṉ Uḷḷiṭṭomum
tava śrīmuṭiyān Aviṉācipaṭṭaṉum bhāradvāci Āḷuṭaiyār ru muṭiyān ṉila mā tirukaṇ
yaṉ pa ḷa koṇṭāṉ Uṭaiyāṉ tiruvāḷaṉāṉa Attiyā kālaketi paṭṭaṉum Iccaṉ
ṉ ciyan viṉotapaṭṭaṉum tiruka nampi muṭaiyāṉ Ivaṉ tama
ka paṭṭaṉum
yaṉ tirumuṭaiyāṉāyanārkku komaṅkalaṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum pullā veti �ṉ tillai Ā
m Uḷḷiṭṭa Ivaṉaivom pāṇṭikulācaṉivaḷaṉāṭṭu � yār kuṭimai
Ulakaṉāṉa Irācentiraciṅkappallava(ā)raiyaṉukku ṉāṅkaḷ tiru[ ṉan=tā] vi kka Upayattiṭṭuk ku
ṭutta paricāvatu Innāyanārkku tirunantāviḷakku Oṉṟukku Iva muppatu vaṭṭattuk �
ṇṭa kācu nūṟṟirupatuṅkoṇṭu policaikku nittamuḻakku E koṇṭu cantirātittavaṟ
vomāka Upaiyattiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 38.452 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
